notes: This report is repo-owned verification truth for the Mazer Playbook convergence slice.
ATLAS root consumes this artifact read-only and does not synthesize a second verification store.
Mazer remains adoption_status=adopted while verified promotion is expressed through verification_status=verified.
The verified claim is scoped to the targeted repo-owned convergence slice described below.

covered_surfaces: Repo-owned Playbook adoption export shape and contract-id coverage.
Repo-owned Playbook verification report shape, scope declaration, and evidence references.
Repo-local architecture check, test suite, and production build path used for this convergence slice.
excluded_surfaces: Manual blessing review, proposal execution, or broader product certification outside this targeted convergence slice.
notes: Verified here means the repo-owned Mazer convergence lane is green and reproducible.
This report does not overclaim every product or operator behavior path as fully verified.
The repo-owned adoption export stays green and remains aligned to the Playbook owner contract.
The targeted adoption test validates the local export against the repo schema and owner contract ids.
The canonical repo-local Playbook green path is verify:local, which runs the verification report test, the adoption export test, and the existing repo verify bridge.
The verification report test keeps the report schema, scope declaration, and command references honest.
